title: malus redolens
intro: Malus redolens, also known as the crab apple or red-smelling apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Malus redolens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote digestion and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
